pages.title: Makeup Stack
pages.description:
Stack matching colorful makeup layers by timing precise placements challenges players to build the tallest balanced tower. Using smooth drag-and-drop controls, each new cosmetic item must align perfectly to avoid toppling as levels progress in difficulty. The game’s visual theme centers on vibrant beauty products, adding charm to the stacking challenge for casual players.

Key Features

• Precise placement stacking mechanic  
• Drag-and-drop makeup item control  
• Progressive tower height challenges  
• Increasing difficulty levels system  
• Colorful cosmetic-themed visuals

pages.title: Makeup Runner
pages.description:

Score multipliers reward flawless runs as levels increase in speed and complexity.

Key Features

• Swipe-based movement controls  
• Timed collectible gathering  
• Increasing obstacle difficulty  
• Multipliers for flawless runs  
• Stylized cityscape setting

pages.title: Makeup Run Challenge

The game challenges reflexes with increasing speed and introduces combo scoring for consecutive successful pickups.

Key Features

• Swipe-based obstacle navigation

• Timed styling challenges  
• Traditional Indian bridal theme

pages.title: ASMR Makeup Spa Salon
pages.description:
Apply soothing makeup treatments and spa techniques in this relaxing casual game. Players use precise touch controls to layer cosmetics and create smooth finishes in a calm salon environment. The game challenges users to complete various facial makeover stages while balancing time and product use to unlock new spa tools and styles.

Key Features

• Touch-based makeup application  
• Layering and blending mechanics  
• Time-limited makeover challenges  
• Unlockable spa tools and brushes  
• Relaxing salon atmosphere

pages.title: ASMR Makeover & Makeup Studio
pages.description:
Apply makeup strokes on detailed facial models to customize looks using layered cosmetic tools in soothing ASMR style. Players combine textures and colors with precision brushes to create unique transformations while managing subtle audio triggers. Progress through increasingly complex clients requiring tailored skin and eye treatments in a relaxed studio environment.

Key Features

• Layered brush stroke mechanic  
• Color blending and texture control  
• Client progression with custom looks  
• Audio-synchronized ASMR effects  
• Interactive makeup studio interface

pages.title: 2018 Stylish Makeup Look
pages.description:
Apply layered cosmetic effects using quick color palette swaps and brush controls to recreate a chic 2018 makeup look. The game challenges players to blend shades and highlight facial features precisely through interactive tool selections. Progression depends on mastering subtle contouring and accurate placement of makeup elements in a virtual studio setup.

Key Features

• Layered color mixing mechanics  
• Brush tool precision controls  
• Progressive facial feature highlighting  
• Step-based makeup application stages  
• Modern cosmetic style simulation
